title: Link! Like! Love Live! Game Ends Service
content: Sales of in-game currency have halted. Refunds for unused paid currency will be issued starting on June 30 until September 30. Link! Like! Love Live! launched in April 2023. Haruko Iizuka ( Little Busters , Horimiya ) designed the characters for the project. Odd No. Inc. publishes the game.
author: ANN

title: JoJo’s Bizarre Adventure: Steel Ball Run Confirms Netflix Release Schedule for 2nd Stage (& Explains the Long Wait)
content: Netflix has addressing the long wait for JoJo’s Bizarre Adventure: Steel Ball Run ‘s new episodes by confirming a promising release schedule for the 2nd Stage in a new update. JoJo’s Bizarre Adventure: Steel Ball Run was one of the most anticipated new anime releases of the Spring 2026 anime schedule as fans have been…
author: ComicBook

title: Tawawa on Monday Manga Takes 2-Month Break
content: This year's 18th issue of Kodansha 's Weekly Young Magazine announced on March 30 Kiseki Himura 's Tawawa on Monday ( Getsuyōbi no Tawawa ) manga is taking a break and will return to serialization in the 26th issue on May 25.
author: ANN

title: Japanese Animation TV Ranking, March 23-29
content: Detective Conan: The Private Eyes' Requiem , the 10th film in the Detective Conan franchise , aired on NTV on Friday, March 27 at 9:00 p.m., and it earned a 7.4% rating. The 2025 Eiga Oshiri Tantei: Star and Moon ( Butt Detective the Movie: Star and Moon) anime film aired on NHK Educational on Sunday, March 29 at 4:00…
author: ANN

title: Shonen Jump’s Most Unique Anime in Years Has Finally Arrived (& You Need to See It Now)
content: As Spring 2026 begins, a wave of new anime has already started rolling out this season. Dozens of series have premiered within just the past few days, including both brand-new titles and returning favorites with new seasons.
author: ComicBook

title: Japanese Animation TV Ranking, March 16-22
content: Poupelle of Chimney Town , Studio 4°C 's anime film of Akihiro Nishino 's picture book of the same title, aired on Fuji TV on Friday, March 20 at 8:00 p.m., and it earned a 2.6% rating.
author: ANN

title: One Piece May Have Finally Introduced a Second Sun God Nika
content: The big reveal in the latest One Piece chapter may have just confirmed the existence of a second Sun God Nika. This entity has been at the center of attention ever since Luffy attained his Gear Fifth form. It has been more or less confirmed that Luffy represents the Sun God Nika, if he isn’t the entity himself.
author: ComicBook

title: The World's Strongest Rearguard - Labyrinth Country's Novice Seeker Anime Reveals 3 New Cast Members
content: The official website for the television anime of Tōwa 's The World's Strongest Rearguard - Labyrinth Country's Novice Seeker ( Sekai Saikyō no Kōei: Meikyūkoku no Shinjin Tansakusha ) light novel series revealed three new cast members on Monday.
author: ANN

title: Third Season of 'Isekai Maou to Shoukan Shoujo no Dorei Majutsu' Announced
content: The official website for the television anime adaptation of Yukiya Murasaki and Takahiro Tsurusaki 's Isekai Maou to Shoukan Shoujo no Dorei Majutsu ( How NOT to Summon a Demon Lord ) light novel announced a third season, subtitled ULT , on Monday.
author: MyAnimeList

title: The Villainess Is Adored by the Prince of the Neighbor Kingdom Light Novel Series Ends in 15th Volume
content: Kadokawa is listing the 15th volume of Punichan 's The Villainess Is Adored by the Prince of the Neighbor Kingdom ( Akuyaku Reijō wa Ringoku no Ōtaishi ni Dekiai Sareru ) light novel series as the final volume. The volume ships on June 15.
author: ANN
